_source: gin7manualsaved.pdf special Text annotations (80 system labels; cx/cy only) + page-101 raster star-dot centers; canonical roster = 85 constmsg group-0x18 systems. 80 systems have P1 manual/raster coordinates. Five constmsg-P0 systems (13/32/34/52/75) use MINIMAP_P3_VIRTUAL_OVERLAY grid coordinates, P3 virtual planets, and P3 virtual stellar colors for the playable server overlay; they are not original server/manual data. sub45 タンホイザーゲート is a gate label, not a star system.

_specialBodies._grade: P1 (existence/count) — Null_galaxy.mdx scene-graph named nodes (content/extracted/model-galaxy-stars.json special_bodies)
_specialBodies._provenance: data/model/strategy/Null_galaxy.mdx 노드명: bh_01..bh_03 (블랙홀 3) + ns_01..ns_03 (중성자별 3). 3D-맵 천체이며 노드 인덱스는 galaxy.json 성계 순서가 아님(매핑 캐논 부재).
_specialBodies._cellPlacement: UNVERIFIED (P3): 어느 성계/그리드 셀에 속하는지 캐논 매핑이 없다. 추측 좌표를 P0로 승격하지 않는다 — 0x0315 빌더는 blackHoleCells/neutronStarCells를 호출자가 명시할 때만 進入不可 장애물(값 90/91)로 인코딩한다.
_specialBodies._impassable: 진입불가(프라즈마/사르가소와 동일 class blocked). 캐논 group-0x18 전용 라벨 부재 → 航行不能(2) 라벨 재사용.
_specialBodies._placement: game-mdx:null_galaxy.mdx transform section, projected to galaxy px via verified rigid transform (R2=0.9999). ABSOLUTE POSITION confirmed; grid-cell/system membership still uncanon.

_planet_order: orbital inner->outer (orbit index 1-based); evidenced by numbered systems + capital orbit variance (Odin=2,Heinessen=3,Fezzan=4)

_canon_grid.note: canonCol/canonRow feed the 0x0315 zero-indexed wire array; canonGameCol/canonGameRow are the 1-indexed in-game grid coordinates

_galaxy_provenance.coords: matched 79 systems = game-original (null_galaxy.mdx tail transform, 0.25-grid); manual cx/cy independently reproduces to <1px (rigid 90deg, R2=0.9999)
_galaxy_provenance.spectralClass: matched 79 = game-original (mdx node tag); replaced 35 PDF-color-guessed values
_galaxy_provenance.unmatched: 1 with manual coord (フォルセティ) + 5 virtual-overlay-P3
